publicationStmt.publisher: Collaboratory for Writing and Research on Culture (CWRC https://cwrc.ca) and Linked Editing Academic Framework (LEAF https://leaf-vre.org).

sourceDesc.p: This template was created by members of CWRC and LEAF.

head.title: Donació de dotze castells en feu a Bernat Ató IV pel comte Ramon Berenguer III

div.p: En compliment de l’acord signat el dia anterior, el comte Ramon Berenguer III de Barcelona dóna en feu a Bernat Ató IV, vescomte de Besiers, els dotze castells que n’ha rebut en alou.

B avantposa la rúbrica Donatio quam fecit Raimundus, comes Barcinonensis, Bernardo Atonis super duodecim castellis Carcassonae.Ego Raimundus Berengarii, Barchinonensis comes, dono ad fevum tibi Bernardo Atonis, Biterrensi vicecomiti, Boxazon,Boxahonem D. Roccam Cedam,Rocham Cezieram D; Rocham Cedenam E. Ambiletum, Curvallem, Castlar, Pedenaz, Castellum Novum, Messoam, Castellum Sancti Poncii, Poietum, Mercoirol et Calvitionem,Calumcionem D. quod reddas illos mihi quando ego illosillos omès E i HGL. tibi requiram per me aut per meum missum et quodaut HGL. servias illos mihi.
